news.title: Pope Leo XIV urges AI regulation for the common good
news.description: Pope Leo XIV has called for robust regulation of artificial intelligence and for its developers to work for the common good rather than profit. He made the call in a sweeping manifesto on safeguarding humankind as the technology impacts everything from work t…

news.title: An Anthropic employee built an AI wedding site. Then an angry emoji went viral.
news.description: An Anthropic employee used Claude Code to turn 12 years of texts with his partner into an AI wedding recap. One emoji stat stole the show.

news.title: Pope Leo to weigh in on the perils and promises of artificial intelligence
news.description: Pope Leo XIV is scheduled to release a major papal document on the perils and promises of Artificial Intelligence. The co-founder of Anthropic will be in Rome for the document's release.
